---
title: "Contact"
---

Ben Spoek, M.Sc.  
Research Assistant

## Affiliation

RWTH Aachen University  
Chair of Energy Efficient Buildings and Indoor Climate  
E.ON Energy Research Center

## Office

Building: 4120  
Room: 20.04  
Mathieustr. 10  
52074 Aachen  
Germany

## Email

Email: [ben.spoek@eonerc.rwth-aachen.de](mailto:ben.spoek@eonerc.rwth-aachen.de)

Further institutional contact information is available on my [RWTH/EBC profile](https://www.ebc.eonerc.rwth-aachen.de/cms/e-on-erc-ebc/Das-Institut/Mitarbeiter/Team6/~bmupgv/Ben-Spoek/lidx/1/).

## Profiles

- [RWTH/EBC profile](https://www.ebc.eonerc.rwth-aachen.de/cms/e-on-erc-ebc/Das-Institut/Mitarbeiter/Team6/~bmupgv/Ben-Spoek/lidx/1/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0005-7791-4948)
- [Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=59954657600)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-spoek/)

## Legal

- [Impressum](impressum.qmd)
- [Privacy Notice](privacy.qmd)
